---
title: "News"
listing:
  contents: posts_news
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: false
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false
---
<div class="page-hero">
  <div class="page-hero-content">
    <p class="page-subtitle">KAIST IAM Group</p>
    <h1>News</h1>
  </div>
</div>
